_meta.description: Starter rates and notes for UK trades, used only when an intake's trader block doesn't specify hourly_rate_gbp or callout_fee_gbp. Conservative mid-market estimates as of May 2026.

electrical.regulatory_notes: Notifiable work under Part P must be tested and certified. Reference NICEIC / NAPIT registration if applicable.

plumbing_heating.regulatory_notes: Gas work requires Gas Safe registration — never quote gas work without a registered engineer doing the work. Reference number where applicable.

building.regulatory_notes: Building Regulations notification may apply (Part L, Part P, etc.). Quote does not include building control fees unless stated.

groundworks.regulatory_notes: Quote assumes no asbestos / contaminated land / underground services not disclosed at survey.

bricklaying.regulatory_notes: Quote assumes mortar mix and lifting plant included; scaffold above 1.5m extra unless stated.

general.regulatory_notes: Generic quote; check trade-specific regs as appropriate.
